title: thalictrum minus subsp. valentinum
intro: Thalictrum minus subsp. valentinum, also known as meadow rue, is a perennial plant in the family Ranunculaceae. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin issues, and infections. The plant is also said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. Meadow rue is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
